pages.title: Gerard McCaul — Theoretical Physicist
pages.description: Personal website of Dr. Gerard McCaul, theoretical physicist. Research in quantum control, open quantum systems, reservoir computing, and superoscillations.
pages.og_description: Theoretical physicist. Research in quantum control, open quantum systems, reservoir computing, and superoscillations. 25+ publications including PRL.
pages.twitter_description: Theoretical physicist. Quantum control, open quantum systems, reservoir computing, superoscillations.

pages.body_scripts:
<script>
    fetch('https://littlelearningmachine.substack.com/api/v1/posts/?limit=1')
      .then(function (r) { return r.json(); })
      .then(function (posts) {
        if (!posts || !posts.length) return;
        var p = posts[0];
        document.getElementById('home-latest-link').href = p.canonical_url;
        document.getElementById('home-latest-title').textContent = p.title;
        document.getElementById('home-latest-post').style.display = '';
      })
      .catch(function () { });
  </script>

pages.title: Physics — Gerard McCaul
pages.description: Research, publications, and talks by Dr. Gerard McCaul. 25+ papers spanning quantum control, open quantum systems, superoscillations, reservoir computing, and Koopman mechanics.
pages.og_description: 25+ publications in PRL, PRB, PRA, Quantum and more. Research spanning quantum control, open quantum systems, superoscillations, and reservoir computing.
pages.twitter_description: 25+ publications in PRL, PRB, PRA, Quantum. Quantum control, superoscillations, reservoir computing.

pages.description: Talks and presentations by Gerard McCaul, including seminars on dynamics, computation, and quantum structure.

pages.twitter_description: Talks on dynamics, computation, quantum structure, and related physics.

pages.title: Writing — Gerard McCaul
pages.description: Essays, prize-winning fiction, and creative writing by Dr. Gerard McCaul. FQxI 2nd place essay, Quantum-Steampunk runner-up, gonzo memoir, and a Substack on physics and fatherhood.
pages.og_description: Prize-winning essays, gonzo memoir, and a Substack on physics and fatherhood by theoretical physicist Gerard McCaul.
pages.twitter_description: FQxI 2nd place essay, Quantum-Steampunk runner-up, and scraps from a physicist with authorial delusions.
pages.body_scripts:
<script>
    fetch('https://littlelearningmachine.substack.com/api/v1/posts/?limit=1')
      .then(function (r) { return r.json(); })
      .then(function (posts) {
        if (!posts || !posts.length) return;
        var p = posts[0];
        document.getElementById('substack-latest-link').href = p.canonical_url;
        document.getElementById('substack-latest-title').textContent = p.title;
        if (p.subtitle) document.getElementById('substack-latest-subtitle').textContent = p.subtitle;
        var date = new Date(p.post_date).toLocaleDateString('en-GB', { year: 'numeric', month: 'short', day: 'numeric' });
        document.getElementById('substack-latest-date').textContent = date;
        document.getElementById('substack-latest').style.display = '';
      })
      .catch(function () { });
  </script>

pages.title: Visualisations — Gerard McCaul
pages.description: Interactive mathematical visualisations by Dr. Gerard McCaul  -  dynamical systems, Koopman operators, phase portraits, and Carleman lifting.
pages.og_description: Interactive mathematical visualisations: phase portraits, Koopman operators, Carleman lifting, and the dimensionality-nonlinearity trade.
pages.twitter_description: Interactive mathematical visualisations: dynamical systems, Koopman operators, Carleman lifting.
